programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Katey and Dan plan a night of fun with Josh and Holly. Nicolle and Ben try a couple swap, but can Nicolle overcome her anxieties.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Luke, who's lost his dating mojo, is raring to re-invigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Dave and Lynn get to work on their dream farmhouse kitchen-diner, while Pete goes shopping for a tractor for his family's new smallholding.

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: The fun-filled lives of the Brits seeking a fresh start. In Orlando, it's opening night for the Best of British pub. In Kissimmee, Anthony's busy cooking at his own birthday party.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: The Garners show Helen and Peter a showstopper with two pools, a separate apartment and spectacular views. The Aldertons deliver Costa Blanca surprises for Caroline and David.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ravin and Pritti want to find a new permanent home on Gran Canaria for themselves and their extended family. Jean Johansson shows them five fantastic properties for their £180,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Catherine and Paul have their hearts set on buying a holiday home on the Costa Adeje, Tenerife, to enjoy with their family. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect property for £150k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bob and Vida want to buy a holiday bolthole on the west coast of the Peloponnese that one day could become their permanent home. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for their £300k.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Vivienne and Simon re-invent a tired room into an Empire suite. But with loads to do will the Empire strike back? And Tim and Sasha's bride goes missing.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: This episode celebrates one of Kirstie's biggest builds as we look back at how Keeley and Terence completely overhauled their Woodford home beyond recognition.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous 22-year-old Shanice plans an evening of sumptuous but risky food and scintillating conversation, about everything from lookalikes to riding polar bears.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ex-estate agent Vivi serves a Norwegian feast inspired by her homeland, on a night that features ghost stories and nursery rhymes. But there's tension between two guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night, Charlotte takes a risk with an Asian-inspired menu. But the biggest surprise comes when the group discover her ballerina past.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: With a simple menu, children's entertainment manager David's sense of fun is the focus of his night and Neil finds himself sandwiched between Shanice and Charlotte..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Super-competitive sales director Neil, who resembles James Bond star Daniel Craig, hopes to raise the bar with a caviar starter and artistically angled panna cotta.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: From the Lakes to Whitby, Paul steams through the north of England, cruises on Windermere, and experiences Queen Victoria's private carriage and a fifty-ton wartime loco.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: An old Devon jail becomes a liberating retreat. Opulent caves bring the South African wilderness up close. And a historic Swedish lighthouse shines a light for luxury-lovers.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Josh, who's 27, has come off his motorbike at speed. Georgie arrives at A&E with her 10-month-old son Phoenix, who's been sucking on a bleach tablet.

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A shocking account of the 2018 poisoning of ex-spy Sergei Skripal, with gripping first-hand testimony. Was Britain on the verge of a serious international conflict.

programme.title: Assassin Club
programme.desc: Action with Henry Golding and Sam Neill. An assassin wants to retire for love, but his handler has entered him into a deadly game of hit the hitman. Can he survive to live his dream.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Katey and Dan plan a night of fun with Josh and Holly. Nicolle and Ben try a couple swap, but can Nicolle overcome her anxieties.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Luke, who's lost his dating mojo, is raring to re-invigorate his love life and find a lady to relight his fire. And can pole dancer Abi find someone to send her heart into a spin.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the seething Taskmaster. And Joanna Page smashes up a sheep.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Rotterdam
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and Alex Brooker make a splash on their Wikkelboat floating homes before taking a rooftop tour, tickling their tastebuds with fermented flavours and having a go at pinball.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Gary and Annette make plans to split their old Somerset vicarage in two, so they can rent out one half and live in the other.

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: In Orlando, the Best of British pub adds afternoon tea to the menu, but can scones survive the 40-degree heat? Denise is selling her cherished home. Donna prepares for a big break.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, the Garners help friends Lynn and Della balance a modern bolthole with a community feel. Charlotte Rodriguez treats Barry and Mandy to Alicante's sun-soaked options.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie want a holiday home on the beautiful island of Fuerteventura where they can spend quality time together. Ben Hillman shows them what their £115k can buy in Caleta de Fuste.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair dream of swapping Scottish winters for the white sandy beaches of sunny Gran Canaria. Jasmine Harman lines up five fantastic holiday homes for their £350,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In and around the beautiful villages of Haute Vienne in southern France, Sara Damergi helps recently engaged Michelle and Steve find the perfect family holiday home for their £100k budget.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul race to waterproof their basement as river levels rise. Eleanor and Ben peruse the Pyrenees for a new family home. Vivienne and Simon rush to finish their suite.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Catherine and Nigel's dated, 70s-style bungalow in Larne. Was the addition of a garage a love-it game changer.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Land surveyor Moony hosts a Pakistani evening, with family recipes and an authentic seating arrangement on the floor of his specially dressed dining room.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Christine's guests are dreading her meat-free menu, while Christine is anxious about Rosie's feedback after she compared Moony's food to vomit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mobile hairdresser Ben plans a gourmet night, as he entertains his guests with his amazing body art, cooking skills and pet crabs.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fridge salesman Gregory serves up a Spanish menu and a charm offensive.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rosie has ruffled feathers all week. Now it's her guests' turn to scour every element of her Brazilian night, from the samba dancers to her authentic pig-ear stew.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Rocky the bulldog has had a much-needed facelift for his date, but only has eyes for a toy avocado. Muddy puddle enthusiast Grady the lurcher is looking for a new thrill.

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Fresh air, good vibes, and smoky magic! Jamie Oliver fires us up with top tips to perfect our grill skills. He cooks juicy sirloin three ways and makes luscious lamb lollipops.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient with an ankle injury recalls how meeting her husband saved her life. And 84-year-old Ioannis is treated for dizziness as his kids speak warmly of a brave, loving father.

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Peter has a fast-growing tumour and needs throat reconstruction to save his life. Janet's pancreatic cancer is wrapped around a vital vein - can the growth be removed.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two air ambulance teams scramble to help a critically injured dad and his two young sons after a car collision. Gardener Graham has a nasty open ankle fracture.

programme.title: Love Cheats: The Fake Lord
programme.desc: True crime series following extraordinary stories of romance fraud and the fight to bring con artists to justice. A fake lord cheats his victims out of thousands.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britain's favourite personalities hit the sofa and tune in for The 1% Club, Spy in the Ocean, Fake Profile, The Yorkshire Vet and lots more great TV.

programme.title: Wonders of the World I Can't See
programme.desc: In Rome, Chris McCausland and Tom Allen train as gladiators and make pasta, before Tom tries to describe the Colosseum to Chris.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: A former Birmingham City footballer sings for her grandad. A navy officer performs Nessun Dorma and brings the shoppers to a standstill. And Nat King Cole has everyone dancing.
